metadata.name: Handle a Passenger Re-route at the Airport

description: A passenger has missed their connecting flight due to a delay on their first flight. A gate agent must rebook them.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's booking and confirm they have misconnected.
Search for the next available flight to the passenger's destination.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a flight later that day with available seats.

nodes.task_description: Rebook the passenger on the new flight and issue them a new boarding pass, along with meal vouchers for the inconvenience.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully rebooks the passenger and provides compensation.
